root: ^Thought I saw the last of any visitors... You here to shop or chat strange little feller?
^So, hey, uh what's on your mind?

talk: ^This place just ain't what it used to be, you wouldn't believe it.
^I remember children laughing... and music throughout the streets.
^Eh, sounds depressing, I'm just here for potions.

c-0: ^Nothin's been the same since the music stopped.
^Those damned demons showed up, forcin' their silence on us all!
^You know, you're the most upbeat customer I've had in years!

talk2: ^I'm sorry this happened to your town, I hope I can make things right.
^I'm going to bring this town back to life, don't worry, my music will be heard!

c-0: ^Don't worry about it kid, it's not like you got us in this mess.
c-1: ^Well, feel free to swing by again if yer' still breathing! HAHAhaha!
